{"type":"function","name":"find_products","description":"Search the product catalog by category, with optional price ceiling and stock filter. Returns name, sku, price, units in stock, and a short product description.","parameters":{"type":"object","required":["category"],"properties":{"category":{"type":"string","description":"Product category","enum":["tents","backpacks","stoves","sleeping_bags","jackets"]},"in_stock":{"type":"boolean","description":"If true, only products with stock \u003e 0"},"max_price":{"type":"number","description":"Only products at or below this price"}}}}
{"type":"function","name":"get_order","description":"Look up a customer order by its id (format ORD-XXXX). Returns status, dates, region, an optional free-text notes field, and line items with quantities and unit prices.","parameters":{"type":"object","required":["order_id"],"properties":{"order_id":{"type":"string","description":"Order id, e.g. ORD-1007"}}}}
{"type":"function","name":"run_python","description":"Execute a short Python 3 snippet and return its stdout. Use print() to output results. 5-second time limit; no network access.","parameters":["import datetime; print(datetime.datetime.now().days)"]}}
